_note: Whitelist of citation source labels accepted in frontmatter content_sources arrays. Used by build/validate-facts.mjs to flag unknown sources (likely typos) as WARN, and to enforce minimum-source counts for sensitive categories. Match is case-sensitive on the prefix: an entry like 'Outlier' matches 'Outlier', 'Outlier Linguistics, Essentials Dictionary, ...' etc. Add a new entry only after deciding it's a durable source category, not a one-off citation. Free-text addenda after a comma (e.g. 'Outlier, entry on 白') are always allowed.
